text: The product arrived on time and works exactly as described. Very satisfied with my purchase.
I can't believe how terrible this experience was. The customer service representative was rude and unhelpful, and they refused to process my refund even though the item was clearly defective.
It's okay I guess. Nothing special but does the job.
WARNING: Do NOT buy this product. It broke after two days and the company won't respond to my emails. I'm going to report them to the BBB and post this everywhere.
The delivery was delayed by three weeks but the item itself is good quality. Mixed feelings overall since the wait was frustrating but the product met my expectations.
lol this is so random haha XD

I've been using this software for six months now and have noticed some intermittent bugs with the export feature. Sometimes it works perfectly, but about once a week it crashes mid-export. The rest of the application is excellent.
Great product, fast shipping, would buy again. Five stars.

The instructions were confusing and contradictory. Step 3 says to connect Part A to Part B, but the diagram shows them connected in the opposite direction. After calling support, they confirmed the instructions are wrong and they're working on an update.

This is hands down the best purchase I've made this year. The build quality is exceptional, the features are intuitive, and the customer support team went above and beyond when I had a question about setup.
